nasb.text: I did not send these prophets, But they ran. I did not speak to them, But they prophesied.

esv.text: “I did not send the prophets, yet they ran; I did not speak to them, yet they prophesied.

cnv.text: “我沒有差派這些先知， 但他們自己到處跑； 我沒有對他們說話， 他們竟擅自說預言。

ccb.text: “我没有差遣这些先知， 他们却妄自行动； 我没有对他们说话， 他们却乱发预言。
